'''kawoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khachkar|khachkar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khachkar|khachkar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kawoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæweyeth|kæweyeth]] || [[word:kæweyej|kæweyej]] || [[word:kæweyesh|kæweyesh]] || [[word:kæweye|kæweye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawowoyoth|kawowoyoth]] || [[word:kawowoyoj|kawowoyoj]] || [[word:kawowoyosh|kawowoyosh]] || [[word:kawowoyo|kawowoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawoyoth|kawoyoth]] || [[word:kawoyoj|kawoyoj]] || [[word:kawoyosh|kawoyosh]] || [[word:kawoyo|kawoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawofyoth|kawofyoth]] || [[word:kawofyoj|kawofyoj]] || [[word:kawofyosh|kawofyosh]] || [[word:kawofyof|kawofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawoyotho|kawoyotho]] || [[word:kawoyojo|kawoyojo]] || [[word:kawoyosho|kawoyosho]] || [[word:kawoyoko|kawoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawoyoth|kawoyoth]] || [[word:kawoyoj|kawoyoj]] || [[word:kawoyosh|kawoyosh]] || [[word:kawoyo|kawoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawoyothol|kawoyothol]] || [[word:kawoyojol|kawoyojol]] || [[word:kawoyoshol|kawoyoshol]] || [[word:kawoyokol|kawoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawoyothotho|kawoyothotho]] || [[word:kawoyojojo|kawoyojojo]] || [[word:kawoyoshosho|kawoyoshosho]] || [[word:kawoyoko|kawoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawoyothon|kawoyothon]] || [[word:kawoyojon|kawoyojon]] || [[word:kawoyoshon|kawoyoshon]] || [[word:kawoyokon|kawoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawoyothoro|kawoyothoro]] || [[word:kawoyojoro|kawoyojoro]] || [[word:kawoyoshoro|kawoyoshoro]] || [[word:kawoyokoro|kawoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
